events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Multi-talented global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's enduring appeal
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the one and only J.Lo! From the Bronx to global icon, she's still dominating. What's your favourite J.Lo track or movie moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever played.

angles.name: The day the video star was born
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV arrived and changed music forever. And what was the first video? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles, of course! Irony much?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop's big bang
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from that absolute Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, love & music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What's the one act you wish you could've seen there?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: The King's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, a true legend whose music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tupac's impact
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur today. His lyrics and legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Guitar God's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His guitar mastery remains legendary. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that famous zebra crossing cover, on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic album, iconic cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock icon's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll star's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll energy. What's your favourite tune featuring his vocals?

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine all the people
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon released 'Imagine' in the UK. A powerful message that still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: The music revolution in your pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple dropped a game-changer that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many did you own?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, not stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Sean Connery to Daniel Craig, who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's enduring spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy. What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' White Album turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: The Fab Four's diverse masterpiece
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unveiled 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece that still sounds incredible today. What's your standout track?
